title: juncus tenageia
intro: Juncus tenageia, also known as grass-leaved rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Juncus tenageia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
